x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Now Assist core plugins are the prerequisite gate for all AI features. Without active plugins no Now Assist capability can function regardless of data quality or entitlement.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Activate Now Assist Core via the ServiceNow Store or sys_plugins_list.do. Confirm entitlement with your ServiceNow account team before activation. Now Assist Core is the prerequisite gate for all Now Assist module capabilities.
